headline: Inside China's AI Startup Engine Building $50 Billion Giants—and Targeting the US
summary: While much of the global conversation around artificial intelligence funding focuses on Silicon Valley mega cheques, a parallel and far more capital-efficient ecosystem is scaling quietly in China.

headline: Hedge Funds Increase Gold Bets to 16-Week High
Revolutionary Guard Commander Warns US: Iran 'More Ready Than Ever, Finger on the Trigger'
summary: The head of Iran's Revolutionary Guard has issued a sharp warning to Washington as American warships move toward the Middle East.

headline: Libya Signs 25-Year Oil Deal Worth Billions With TotalEnergies, ConocoPhillips
summary: Libya signed a 25-year Waha-led oil pact with TotalEnergies and ConocoPhillips, aiming for major output growth.

headline: Haiti Council Moves To Oust Prime Minister, Defying US
summary: Haiti's transitional council voted to replace Prime Minister Alix Didier Fils-Aime, despite U.S. warnings over stability.

headline: Charlie Munger Admits He And Warren Buffett Made Mistakes But They Weren't Major Ones Because Of This Reason
summary: Charlie Munger believed Berkshire Hathaway's advantage was keeping it simple, avoiding bureaucracy. He urged to know one's limits and reduce big errors.

headline: 'Trump Threatens Canada With 100% Tariff Over Pending Trade Deal With China' - Reuters News
Gamestop Meme Stock Saga at 5: What Endured and What's Changed
summary: Half a decade has passed since the GameStop upheaval that threatened to destabilize the global financial system.

headline: Tesla China FSD Timeline Gets Pushback After Musk Davos Comments
summary: Tesla's Elon Musk said China could approve FSD soon, but Chinese sources signaled no near-term clearance.

headline: Trump Threatens 'Governor Carney' With 100% Tariff on Canada
summary: President Trump issued a threat to impose a 100% tariff on Canadian imports, escalating the ongoing dispute spurred by Canada's recent trade agreement with China.

headline: Trump Says Secret 'Discombobulator' Weapon Was Key to Maduro Capture
summary: President Trump said that a covert weapon that he called "The Discombobulator" was used in the US operation that captured Venezuelan leader Nicolás Maduro.

headline: Uber CEO Once Called Bitcoin A 'Proven Commodity,' But Found These Cryptos More 'Practical' For This Reason
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. (NYSE:UBER) CEO Dara Khosrowshahi once stressed the importance of embracing cryptocurrencies for practical purposes rather than as a “store of value.”

headline: Iranian Official Predicts 'Regional Collapse' if Regime Falls
summary: A senior Iranian official has warned about the potential collapse of the Middle East if the Islamic Republic falls. The warning comes amid escalating tensions between the US and Iran.

headline: Us Confirms 'Lethal' Boat Strike for First Time Since Maduro Capture
summary: U.S. Southern Command confirmed a deadly maritime strike against a suspected drug-trafficking vessel in the eastern Pacific Ocean.

headline: UBS Eyes Crypto Trading, Dogecoin ETF Goes Live And More: Weekend Crypto Roundup
summary: The week's crypto roundup highlights UBS preparing to offer Bitcoin and Ethereum trading to wealthy clients, Dogecoin's first SEC-approved ETF debuting and industry leaders weighing regulatory compromises and ecosystem support.

headline: Tesla's FSD Price Hike, GM's Production Shift, Boeing's Contract Surge And More: This Week In Mobility
summary: The week in tech and autos featured Tesla hiking FSD prices and releasing Q4 estimates, GM reshaping production amid an NHTSA probe, and Boeing securing a surge in foreign government contracts.

headline: 'Libya Signs 25-Year Oil Deal With TotalEnergies And ConocoPhillips; Deal Is Aimed At Boosting Production Capacity By Up To 850,000 Barrels Per Day And Is Expected To Generate Net Revenues Of More Than $376B' - Reuters News
Weekend Tech Roundup: Nvidia's China Strategy, Taiwan Semiconductor's Shift, Intel's Q4 Earnings And More
summary: The week's tech roundup spans Nvidia navigating strong China demand despite constraints, Taiwan Semiconductor shifting toward next-generation manufacturing, Intel topping Q4 earnings expectations, Netflix casting doubt on Paramount's Warner Bros bid, and Elon Musk reviving Tesla's Dojo3 supercomputer project.

headline: Benzinga's 'Stock Whisper' Index: 5 Stocks Investors Secretly Monitor But Don't Talk About Yet
summary: The Benzinga Stock Whisper Index highlights five stocks seeing increased attention from Benzinga readers during the week and looks at the potential catalysts.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Netflix, Capital One, Intuitive Surgical — And Markets Ride Greenland Roller Coaster
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Ron DeSantis Blames Dollar Instability As Silver Hits Record Highs: If The US Had A 'Stable Currency' Silver Wouldn't Set New Records
summary: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis linked silver's historic surge past $103 to dollar instability, calling for a stable currency as March 2026 silver futures closed up 5.15% on Friday.

headline: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Lands In China As Nvidia Awaits Beijing's Verdict On H200 AI Chip
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang is visiting China as Beijing weighs whether to allow sales of Nvidia's H200 AI chip, a decision that has become a key flashpoint in U.S.-China tech tensions despite strong interest from major Chinese firms.

headline: Meta CTO Andrew Bosworth Calls Llama 4 A 'Disappointment,' But Says The Upcoming AI Model Shows Promise: 'Looking Really Good'
summary: Meta CTO Andrew Bosworth called Llama 4 a "disappointment" but said the new AI model shows promise for a 2026 release, amid internal challenges for Scale AI founder Alexandr Wang and ongoing shifts in VR and mobile strategy.

headline: Cathie Wood Forecasts More Than 7% GDP Growth, Negative Inflation, Says CEOs Must 'Drive This Change' As AI Spurs Transformation
summary: ARK Invest CEO Cathie Wood said real GDP growth will surge north of 7% while inflation turns negative, driven by AI-powered productivity gains in what she called “the biggest entrepreneurial explosion in history.”

headline: Trump Says US Will Bid For World Expo 2035, Appoints Marco Rubio To Lead The Effort:  'Incredible Stage' To Showcase America's 'Golden Age'
summary: President Trump announced the U.S. bid to host the 2035 World Expo in Miami, with Secretary of State Marco Rubio leading the effort.

headline: Gene Munster Says C-Suite Can't Discuss Openly About AI Job Cuts After Anthropic CEO Warns Unemployment Could Hit 10%: 'Hard To Talk About'
summary: Amazon is preparing to cut nearly 30,000 corporate jobs in a second wave of layoffs, highlighting how AI-driven workforce changes are reshaping corporate America while executives struggle to openly discuss the impact on employees.

headline: Prince Harry, Keir Starmer Slam Trump's Remarks On NATO Forces In Afghanistan: 'Sacrifices Deserve To Be Spoken About Truthfully And With Respect'
summary: Prince Harry and Prime Minister Keir Starmer criticized President Trump's comments questioning NATO's role in Afghanistan, calling them disrespectful to fallen British service members.

headline: Rick Rieder Emerges As Front-Runner In Fed Chair Race As Prediction Markets React To Trump Signals— And The Gap Is Wide
summary: Prediction markets show BlackRock executive Rick Rieder surging ahead as President Donald Trump's leading pick for Federal Reserve chair after being interviewed, as a Justice Department probe into Chair Jerome Powell fuels growing concerns about political pressure and central bank independence.

headline: Japan Keeps Markets Guessing On Currency Intervention After Sudden Yen Jump, New York Fed Conducts Rate Checks
summary: Japan's yen jumped sharply, fueling intervention speculation as senior officials refused to comment on possible rate checks while political uncertainty grew ahead of Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi's snap election call.

headline: Eric Trump Says Trump Family-Linked World Liberty Financial's Stablecoin USD1 Has Eclipsed PayPal's Digital Dollar: 'The Shift Is Happening'
summary: USD1, the stablecoin issued by World Liberty Financial, has surpassed PayPal's PYUSD in size and closed Friday at $0.9999 with $6.23 billion in 24-hour trading volume.

headline: Gavin Newsom Says California Will Join WHO's Outbreak Network One Day After Trump Pulls US Out, Calls President's Move 'Reckless'
summary: California Gov. Gavin Newsom announced the state will become the first in the U.S. to join the WHO's Global Outbreak Alert and Response Network, calling President Donald Trump's decision to withdraw the country from the organization "reckless" and pledging to keep California engaged in global public health efforts.

headline: When Silver Hits $100 And Gold Nears $5,000, Something Bigger Is Happening — This Week On Wall Street
summary: Gold flirted with the record $5,000-per-ounce mark, while silver blasted through the $100-per-ounce threshold to a new all-time high.
